Idiom (Cham): Mon la kham, nyu la kham.
Syntactic Structure & Grammatical Form: Parallel fixed clause with locative repetition; balanced bipartite construction.
Figurative Meaning (Contextualized Defin: Wherever you go, carry your dignity and integrity.
Non-Idiomatic Equivalent (Plain, Neutral: Always maintain your honor in every situation.
Usage Contexts: Daily speech; family advice; leadership discourse.
Cultural Origin or Historical Reference: Rooted in Konyak village honor culture emphasizing personal and clan dignity.
First Example Sentence: Abo angha la, “Mon la kham, nyu la kham,” ta shang nyan.
Second Example Sentence: Angh school la shang tha, mon la kham, nyu la kham, abo ta wang.
Third Example Sentence: Konyak angh nyu la kham, mon la kham la nyan.

Idiom (Cham): Wang la mhan, kham la mhan.
Syntactic Structure & Grammatical Form: Rhythmic dual predicate clause with adjectival intensifier.
Figurative Meaning (Contextualized Defin: Act with courage and stand firm.
Cultural Origin or Historical Reference: Linked to warrior-era ethos of boldness among Konyak clans.
First Example Sentence: Angh competition la shang tha, wang la mhan, kham la mhan.
Second Example Sentence: Abo nyu ta wang, wang la mhan, kham la mhan.
Third Example Sentence: Mon youth la wang la mhan, kham la mhan la nyan.

Figurative Meaning (Contextualized Defin: Life has both good and bad moments.
Non-Idiomatic Equivalent (Plain, Neutral: There are ups and downs in life.
First Example Sentence: Angh la da, la mhan la nyan, abo ta shang.
Second Example Sentence: Mon village la la da, la mhan la wang nyan.
Third Example Sentence: Angh project la la da, la mhan la mhan nyan.

Idiom (Cham): Nyu wang la, mon wang la.
Cultural Origin or Historical Reference: Emerges from communal labor traditions in Mon District.
First Example Sentence: Aoleang la nyu wang la, mon wang la nyan.
Second Example Sentence: Village meeting la nyu wang la, mon wang la ta shang.
Third Example Sentence: Angh la nyu wang la, mon wang la la nyan.

Idiom (Cham): Kham la tha, wang la tha.
Cultural Origin or Historical Reference: Derived from village defense coordination signals.
First Example Sentence: Fire la kham la tha, wang la tha!
Second Example Sentence: Angh nyu la kham la tha, wang la tha ta wang.
Third Example Sentence: Emergency la kham la tha, wang la tha la nyan.

Idiom (Cham): Mon kham la nyan, nyu kham la nyan.
Figurative Meaning (Contextualized Defin: Peace in the land brings peace among people.
Non-Idiomatic Equivalent (Plain, Neutral: When society is stable, people feel secure.
Phonetic Transcription (IPA, Cham): /mon kʰam la ɲan ɲu kʰam la ɲan/
First Example Sentence: Leader ta shang, mon kham la nyan, nyu kham la nyan.
Second Example Sentence: Peace meeting la mon kham la nyan, nyu kham la nyan.
Third Example Sentence: Angh speech la mon kham la nyan, nyu kham la nyan ta wang.

Idiom (Cham): Wang mhan la, la mhan la.
Non-Idiomatic Equivalent (Plain, Neutral: Keep trying and you will succeed.
First Example Sentence: Exam la wang mhan la, la mhan la ta shang.
Second Example Sentence: Angh work la wang mhan la, la mhan la nyan.
Third Example Sentence: Youth la wang mhan la, la mhan la la nyan.

Idiom (Cham): Nyu la da, wang la da.
First Example Sentence: Angh ta shang, nyu la da, wang la da.
Second Example Sentence: Council meeting la nyu la da, wang la da nyan.
Third Example Sentence: Leader la nyu la da, wang la da la nyan.

Idiom (Cham): Kham nyan la, shang nyan la.
Non-Idiomatic Equivalent (Plain, Neutral: If you wait calmly, clarity comes.
Cultural Origin or Historical Reference: Common in elder-youth dialogues in rural villages.
First Example Sentence: Abo ta shang, kham nyan la, shang nyan la.
Second Example Sentence: Angh problem la kham nyan la, shang nyan la nyan.
Third Example Sentence: Student la kham nyan la, shang nyan la ta wang.

Idiom (Cham): La mhan la, kham nyan la.
Non-Idiomatic Equivalent (Plain, Neutral: Difficult times are followed by better ones.
Cultural Origin or Historical Reference: Oral narrative tradition reflecting seasonal cycles.
First Example Sentence: Angh life la la mhan la, kham nyan la nyan.
Second Example Sentence: Story la la mhan la, kham nyan la ta shang.
Third Example Sentence: Village la la mhan la, kham nyan la la nyan.
